email.subject: Special offers just for you
email.body:
Hi there,

Thanks for being with us for 10 months. We wanted to share a few ways to improve your experience and save money.

• 1-Year Rate Lock: Freeze your monthly price and avoid future increases - $5/month off
• New Customer Loyalty Bonus: Lock in savings as a thank you for joining us - $10/month off for 12 months
• Auto-Pay Discount: Never miss a payment and save every month automatically - $5/month ongoing

If you'd like to learn more, just reply to this email or give us a call.

Best regards,
Customer Success Team
